claim_text: A first internal posterior summary for the DEU full-objective production sampler may be reported with caveats.
required_caveat: Use Stage 3B-10 caveats; not a final publication claim.
evidence_gate: Stage 3B-9 readiness + Stage 3B-10 summary + Stage 3B-11 robustness

claim_text: This is a final external/publication-level cosmological result.
required_caveat: Final publication-style claims remain gated until a later final-claim lock explicitly allows them.
evidence_gate: Stage 3B-12 preflight blocks this claim by design.

claim_text: DEU is preferred over native/LambdaCDM by model comparison evidence.
required_caveat: No explicit sampled model-comparison/Bayes-factor stage has been booked.
evidence_gate: Requires separate external/model-comparison stage; Stage 3A gaps are diagnostic context only.

claim_text: TT_lite was included in the production posterior likelihood.
required_caveat: TT_lite remains diagnostic-only in the current production posterior.

claim_text: TT_lite can be discussed as diagnostic monitoring context only.
required_caveat: Do not treat TT_lite diagnostic checks as production likelihood evidence.

claim_text: Tri-anchor split context must remain attached to posterior statements.
required_caveat: High-l, lowl+TTTEEE, and full-objective anchors remain recorded; production posterior uses the full-objective working lock.

claim_text: Native/baseline comparisons can be described as fixed diagnostic context.
required_caveat: Do not describe fixed diagnostic gaps as a posterior model comparison or Bayes factor.

claim_text: A concise external-facing summary may state that the internal DEU posterior workflow passed readiness and robustness gates.
required_caveat: Phrase as workflow/readiness result, not final cosmological evidence or model superiority.
